title: Decadent Basque Turkish Delight Gratin
description: A kid-friendly, umami-packed gratin that marries Basque flavors with sweet Turkish delight, cooked to a golden finish on a raclette grill.

ingredients.name: Seasoning
ingredients.amount: 1 tsp salt, 1/2 tsp pepper, 1 tsp oregano

instructions: Preheat the raclette grill to medium-high heat.
Heat 2 tbsp olive oil in a skillet on the grill until shimmering.
Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Stir in sliced mushrooms and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add fresh spinach, chickpeas, crushed tomatoes, season with seasoning, turmeric, and ginger, and simmer for 8 minutes until everything is heated through.
Transfer the mixture to a raclette grill dish and spread evenly.
Sprinkle shredded aged cheddar and diced queso fresco over the top.
Dot the grated Turkish delight cubes across the cheese surface.
Place the dish back on the grill and broil until the cheese is melted and bubbly, about 5 to 7 minutes.
Remove, let rest 2 minutes, and serve immediately.
